bagno.metaDescription: Bathroom renovation Modena: survey-to-site process and CILA, Mapei and Kerakoll, Viale Amendola, Via Emilia, Quartiere Musicisti. Quote after survey.
bagno.lead: We turn dated bathrooms into efficient, comfortable spaces with one point of contact coordinating strip-out, plumbing, electrics and finishes — from the first site visit to handover.
bagno.body1: Our bathroom workflow in Modena starts with a site survey (dimensions, systems, budget and style), then a written quote with separate line items. If the job is more than cosmetic, your surveyor or architect checks whether CILA, SCIA or other filings apply under Modena municipal rules and national building codes. With a consistent title or filing, we open the site: controlled demolition, new supplies and wastes, tanking and tiling, with one K.K Edilizia lead coordinating timing, suppliers and quality.
bagno.body2: We use professional materials that signal quality construction: mortars, waterproofing, adhesives and skims from lines such as Mapei and Kerakoll (or equivalent certified systems), with technical data aligned to vapour control and UNI standards. We prepare substrates flat and true, with mesh and anti-crack treatments where needed, before large-format or traditional tiles in humid daily-use conditions.
bagno.body3: We work repeatedly along Viale Amendola, the Via Emilia corridor and the Quartiere Musicisti, plus Buon Pastore and Crocetta — areas where traffic, parking and condominium access shape logistics and delivery slots. We also know historic centre vs ring-road housing and province-wide jobs (Sassuolo, Carpi, Formigine, Castelfranco Emilia), adapting protection, noise and lift moves to neighbours and building rules.
bagno.body4: In condominiums we agree calendars, access and noisy windows with administrators and neighbours; we protect corridors and lifts and limit dust where possible. If partitions or risers need changes, the engineer checks structure; we supply surveys and photos for the executive design. The goal remains an efficient, hygienic bathroom compliant with regulations.
bagno.body5: Permits: we do not replace your qualified technician, but we help you understand what is typical for a Modena bathroom (municipal filings, historic constraints) and what invoices and records your accountant needs for active tax relief. We execute work matching the CILA/SCIA so inspections find no gap between filing and site.
bagno.body6: After you accept the quote, the programme covers demolition, systems, screeds, tanking and finishes — usually several weeks, depending on supplies, season and condominium coordination. You get progress updates and a documented handover. One K.K Edilizia contact from first visit to final installation.

cartongesso.metaTitle: Drywall Modena | Partitions & Ceilings | K.K Edilizia
cartongesso.metaDescription: Drywall Modena: partitions and ceilings, Mapei/Kerakoll finishes, work near Via Emilia, Viale Amendola, Quartiere Musicisti. Tailored quotes.
cartongesso.h1: Drywall and dry lining in Modena
cartongesso.lead: We build partitions, ceilings and bulkheads on metal framing — fast cycles without the long drying times of wet plaster, ready for paint and aligned with the rest of the home.
cartongesso.body1: A drywall job in Modena starts with goals and a survey: reshaping rooms, suspended ceilings with lighting or plant enclosures. We define routes and heights; if distribution changes materially, your technician checks CILA or SCIA. On site we install metal framing and boards in sequence (walls, chases, closures, mesh and skim) so trades test before finishes.
cartongesso.body2: For materials and joint finishes we use professional systems — Mapei and Kerakoll (or equivalent certified lines) for compounds and treatments that limit cracking before paint. Board types follow acoustics, humidity (bath/utility) and loads for a paint-ready, durable surface.
cartongesso.body3: We work along Via Emilia and Viale Amendola, in the Quartiere Musicisti, Buon Pastore and Crocetta, where blocks and traffic shape deliveries and hours. We also cover Sassuolo, Carpi, Formigine and Castelfranco Emilia, adapting logistics (courtyards, stairs, lifts) and protecting common routes with residents and ground-floor shops.
cartongesso.body4: In living areas, ceilings integrate LED, spots or linear channels without excessive drop. Near the historic centre we respect retail hours and vehicle access. We document chases and light centres to avoid cabling errors and simplify inspections.
cartongesso.body5: In condominiums we respect loads, slab drilling and quiet hours; we align with administrators and neighbours on noise and dust. Structural checks stay with the qualified professional; we supply dimensions, photos and a site schedule matching filings.
cartongesso.body6: Quotes show linear metres, board areas, systems and labour; duration depends on complexity (curves, double boards, wet boards). One lead follows through to paint, with documentation useful for tax reporting your accountant handles.

tetto.metaTitle: Roof Replacement Modena | Coverings & Repairs | K.K Edilizia
tetto.metaDescription: Roof replacement Modena: survey, CILA/SCIA with your engineer, Mapei and Kerakoll membranes, sites on Via Emilia, Viale Amendola, Quartiere Musicisti and province.
tetto.h1: Roof replacement and coverings in Modena
tetto.lead: We tackle leaks, worn coverings and thermal bridges with structured work: roof survey, scope, waterproof layering and insulation suited to the Modena plain climate and current regulations.
tetto.body1: The process for a roof in Modena begins with diagnosis: external inspection, under-roof condition and internal signs (leaks, mould). Depending on scope, your engineer may prepare SCIA, CILA or another title: we align strip-off, waterproofing and finishes with the approved design, scheduling for season and safety at height.
tetto.body2: For materials we use layered systems from brands such as Mapei and Kerakoll (or equivalent certified products), with laps, penetrations and chimney junctions executed to standard. We add insulation and, where needed, under-roof ventilation to cut condensation and thermal bridges — signals clients and search engines associate with professional roofing.
tetto.body3: We work on buildings along Via Emilia and Viale Amendola, in the Quartiere Musicisti, Buon Pastore and Crocetta, and province-wide (Sassuolo, Carpi, Formigine, Castelfranco Emilia). In town we coordinate access, road occupancy and hours with councils and condominiums; in hills we factor wind, snow and anchoring. Each site has its logistics: skips, scaffolding, light cranes or phased hand work.
tetto.body4: Gutters, downpipes, skylights and lifelines are priced and scheduled as a system: a roof only performs if the whole perimeter is designed together. On shared roofs we help administrators and meetings with concise priorities and phasing tied to millesimal shares.
tetto.body5: Building filings (permits, communications) belong to your qualified technician by law and scope. We provide operational support: surveys, photos, as-built records and execution matching the filed project so inspections see no mismatch.
tetto.body6: Quotes list build-ups, quantities, labour, estimated duration and manufacturer warranties. Duration depends on pitches, height, scaffolding and weather. One K.K Edilizia lead runs through handover and watertightness checks, with documentation your accountant may use for any applicable tax relief.
